annotation.message: An operand identifier reference is hiding another identifier of the same name.
An operand identifier reference is hiding another identifier of the same name.
An operand identifier reference is hiding another identifier of the same name.

a:s.a:s: /* NOTE: For use by March 2026 US Realm Connectathon participants for internal use only. Not for use or distribution in commercial products. */ library CMS2FHIRPCSDepScreenAndFollowUp version '1.1.000'

def.name: Patient Age 12 Years or Older at Start of Measurement Period

"Patient Age 12 Years or Older at Start of Measurement Period"
